title: Review pull requests for the API redesign
Plan a small birthday party
subtasks: Decide core details: pick date & time, set a budget, estimate guest count, and create a guest list with an RSVP deadline.
Choose venue and theme/decor: select and reserve a location (home, park, or rented space) and pick a simple theme or color scheme.
Plan food & drinks: decide menu (including dietary restrictions), order cake/catering if needed, and make a shopping list for snacks, beverages, and ice.
Send invitations and track RSVPs: create and send digital or paper invites with RSVP date, then monitor responses and update the final headcount.
Prepare day-of logistics: buy decorations/partyware, create a timeline (arrival, cake, games), assign tasks to helpers, and confirm any orders/vendors 2–3 days beforehand.

title: Create awesome claude code app
subtasks: Clarify app purpose and requirements: define core features, target users, platforms (web/mobile/desktop), success criteria, and any integrations (APIs, databases, authentication).

Design app architecture and UX: create wireframes/flow diagrams, choose tech stack (frontend, backend, hosting), define data models and API endpoints, and prepare a development roadmap with milestones.

Develop core functionality and Claude integration: implement frontend UI, backend services, and integrate Claude API for required capabilities (prompt handling, streaming, rate limits, fallback), including unit tests and error handling.
Implement supporting systems and polish: add authentication, persistence, logging/monitoring, billing (if applicable), accessibility, and responsive styling; perform end-to-end testing and bug fixes.
Deploy and iterate: set up CI/CD, deploy to production, monitor usage and errors, collect user feedback, and plan iterative improvements and feature roadmap.
